channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

  2. “Cats: The Jellicle Ball” Live From the New York Times Office  The New York Times
  3. Cats: The Jellicle Ball Opens on Broadway with Star-Studded Red Carpet  broadway.com
  4. Cats: The Jellicle Ball review – ingenious musical revival goes full queer ball  The Guardian
  5. Andrew Lloyd Webber Shares 'What's Wonderful' About Cats: The Jellicle Ball Compared to 2019 Movie (Exclusive)  People.com

item.title: How Pakistan managed to get the US and Iran to a ceasefire - Al Jazeera
item.description:
1. How Pakistan managed to get the US and Iran to a ceasefire  Al Jazeera
  2. 'Talks were almost dead': Pakistan's last-ditch effort to secure Iran war truce  Reuters
  3. Did Trump—Or Another U.S. Partner—Actually Write Pakistan PM Sharif’s X Post?  Forbes
  4. How Pakistan Became Key Mediator Between U.S. and Iran  The New York Times
  5. How Pakistan secured ‘biggest diplomatic win in years’ with Iran ceasefire  The Guardian

item.title: A fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire shows cracks as attacks continue across the region - NPR
item.description:
1. A fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire shows cracks as attacks continue across the region  NPR
  2. Live updates: Iran war ceasefire begins, though some new attacks hit Gulf; Trump and Netanyahu say Lebanon not included in ceasefire  NBC News
  3. Iran war live: Israel continues to attack Lebanon and Tehran strikes Kuwait after US-Iran ceasefire agreed  Reuters
  4. Trump’s Iran ceasefire rocked within hours amid reported missile, drone attacks  Fox News
  5. Missiles Fly Across the Persian Gulf Despite Cease-Fire  WSJ
